and the language the Lord used with the Prophet Joseph Smith while he was imprisoned in Liberty Jail (see D&C 122:7) are similar, both even speaking of the "jaws of hell [gaping] open the mouth." Also compare Jonah 2:7 with the language in Alma 36:18.
